sections.label: Section 5.3.810
sections.translation: What ’ s the matter ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.810b
sections.original: Itan parvam mihi fidem esse apud te ?
sections.translation: That you should put so little confidence in me !

sections.label: Section 5.3.810c
sections.translation: Do you wish me to believe you ? Do you wish me to consider this as quite certain ? Very well , be it so . Well , what ’ s to be done with our friend ’ s [*] daughter ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.812b
sections.translation: She ’ ll do well enough .

sections.label: Section 5.3.812c
sections.translation: Are we to drop her , then ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.813
sections.translation: Why not ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.813b
sections.translation: The other one to stop ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.813c
sections.translation: Just so .

sections.label: Section 5.3.813d
sections.translation: You may go then , Nausistrata .

sections.label: Section 5.3.814
sections.original: Sic pol commodius esse in omnes arbitror quam ut coeperas ,
sections.translation: I ’ faith , I think it better for all that she should remain here as it is ,

sections.label: Section 5.3.815
sections.original: Mancre hanc ; nam perliberalis visa est quum vidi mihi .
sections.translation: than as you first intended ; for she seemed to me a very genteel person when I saw her .

sections.label: Section 5.3.816
sections.translation: What is the meaning of all this ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.816b
sections.translation: Has she shut the door yet ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.816c
sections.translation: Now she has .

sections.label: Section 5.3.816d
sections.translation: O Jupiter ! the Gods do befriend us ; I have found that it is my daughter married to your son .

sections.label: Section 5.3.817b
sections.translation: Ha ! How can that possibly be ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.818b
sections.original: Non satis tutus est ad narrandum hic locus .
sections.translation: This spot is not exactly suited for me to tell it you .

sections.label: Section 5.3.819
sections.translation: Well then , step in-doors .

sections.label: Section 5.3.819b
sections.original: Heus , ne filii quidem nostri hoc resciscant volo .
sections.translation: Hark , you , I don ’ t wish our sons even to come to know of this .

sections.label: Section 5.4.820
sections.original: Laetus sum , ut meae res sese habent , fratri obtigisse quod vult .
sections.translation: I ’ m glad that , however my own affairs go , my brother has succeeded in his wishes . How wise it is to cherish desires of that nature in the mind , that when things run counter , you may easily find a cure for them ! He has both got the money , and released himself from care ; I , by no method , can extricate myself from these troubles ;

sections.label: Section 5.4.825
sections.original: Quin , si hoc celetur , in metu , sin patefit , ill probro sim .
sections.translation: on the contrary , if the matter is concealed , I am in dread — but if disclosed , in disgrace . Neither should I now go home , were not a hope still presented me of retaining her . But where , I wonder , can I find Geta , that I may ask him what opportunity he would recommend me to take for meeting my father ?

sections.label: Section 5.5.829
sections.original: Argentum accepi ; tradidi lenoni ; abduxi mulierem ;
sections.translation: I received the money ; handed it over to the Procurer ; brought away the woman ,

sections.label: Section 5.5.830
sections.original: Curavi propria ea Phaedria ut poteretur ; nam emissa est manu .
sections.translation: that Phaedria might have her as his own — for she has now become free . Now there is one thing still remaining for me to manage ,— to get a respite from the old gentlemen for carousing ; for I ’ ll enjoy myself the next few days .

sections.label: Section 5.5.833
sections.translation: But here ’ s Phormio . ( Going up to him .) What have you to say ?

sections.label: Section 5.5.833b
sections.translation: About what ?

sections.label: Section 5.5.833c
sections.translation: Why — what ’ s Phaedria going to do now ? In what way does he say that he intends to take his fill of love ?

sections.label: Section 5.5.835
sections.translation: In his turn , he ’ s going to act your part .

sections.label: Section 5.5.835b
sections.translation: What part ?

sections.label: Section 5.5.835c
sections.translation: To run away from his father ; he begs that you in your return will act on his behalf — to plead his cause for him . For he ’ s going to carouse at my house . I shall tell the old man that I ’ m going to Sunium , to the fair , to purchase the female servant that Geta mentioned a while since , so that , when they don ’ t see me here , they mayn ’ t suppose that I ’ m squandering their money .

sections.label: Section 5.5.840
sections.translation: But there is a noise at the door of your house .

sections.label: Section 5.5.840b
sections.translation: See who ’ s coming out .

sections.label: Section 5.5.840c
sections.translation: It ’ s Geta .

sections.label: Section 5.6.841
sections.original: O Fortuna , O Fors fortuna , quantis commoditatibus
sections.translation: O fortune ! O good luck ! [*] with blessings how great , how suddenly hast thou loaded this day with thy favors to my master Antipho !—

sections.label: Section 5.6.843
sections.translation: I wonder what it is he means .

sections.label: Section 5.6.843b
sections.translation: And relieved us , his friends , from alarm ; but I ’ m now delaying , in not throwing my cloak [*] over my shoulder ( throws it over his shoulder ) ,

sections.label: Section 5.6.845
sections.original: Atque hominem propero invenire , ut haec quae contigerint sciat .
sections.translation: and making haste to find him , that he may know what has happened .

sections.label: Section 5.6.846
sections.original: Num tu intelligis hic quid narret ?
sections.translation: Do you understand what he ’ s talking about ?

sections.label: Section 5.6.846b
sections.translation: Do you ?

sections.label: Section 5.6.846c
sections.translation: Not at all .

sections.label: Section 5.6.846d
sections.translation: And I just as much .

sections.label: Section 5.6.847
sections.original: Ad lenonem hinc ire pergam : ibi nunc sunt .
sections.translation: I ’ ll be off hence to the Procurer ’ s ; they are there just now . ( Runs along .)

sections.label: Section 5.6.847b
sections.translation: Halloo ! Geta !

sections.label: Section 5.6.847c
sections.translation: There ’ s for you . Is it any thing new or wonderful to be called back , directly you ’ ve started ?

sections.label: Section 5.6.848b
sections.translation: Geta !

sections.label: Section 5.6.849
sections.original: Pergit hercle . Nunquam tu odio tuo me vines .
sections.translation: Do you persist ? Troth , you shall not on this occasion get the better of me by your annoyance .

sections.label: Section 5.6.849b
sections.translation: Won ’ t you stop ?

sections.label: Section 5.6.850
sections.translation: You ’ ll be getting a beating .

sections.label: Section 5.6.850b
sections.original: Id quidem tibi iam fiet , nisi resistis , verbero .
sections.translation: Assuredly that will befall yourself just now unless you stop , you whip-knave .

sections.label: Section 5.6.851
sections.original: Familiariorem oportet esse hunc : minitatur malum .
sections.translation: This must be some one pretty familiar , threatening me with a beating . ( Turns round .) But is it the person I ’ m in search of or not ? ’ Tis the very man ! Up to him at once .

sections.label: Section 5.6.852b
sections.translation: What ’ s the matter ?

sections.label: Section 5.6.852c
sections.translation: O being most blessed of all men living ! For without question , Antipho , you are the only favorite of the Gods .

sections.label: Section 5.6.853
sections.original: O omnium quantum est qui vivunt hominum homo ornatissime !
sections.translation: So I could wish ; but I should like to be told why I ’ m to believe it is so .

sections.label: Section 5.6.856
sections.original: Satin est si te delibutum gaudio reddo ?
sections.translation: Is it enough if I plunge you into a sea of joy ?

sections.label: Section 5.6.856b
sections.translation: You are worrying me to death .

sections.label: Section 5.6.857
sections.original: Quin tu hinc pollicitationes aufer , et quod fers cedo .
sections.translation: Nay but do have done with your promises , and tell us what you bring .

sections.label: Section 5.6.857b
sections.translation: Oh , are you here too , Phormio ?

sections.label: Section 5.6.858b
sections.translation: I am : but why do you delay ?

sections.label: Section 5.6.858c
sections.translation: Listen , then . When we just now paid you the money at the Forum , we went straight

sections.label: Section 5.6.860
sections.original: Sumus profecti : interea mittit herus me ad uxorem tuam .
sections.translation: to Chremes ; in the mean time , my master sent me to your wife .

sections.label: Section 5.6.861
sections.translation: What for ?
